name: Hanafuda [Library of Ruina]
description:
-| J Corp. sent a fixer from Jeong's office to collect on your debt. But the one they sent just so happens to be your roommate.|-

Debtor POV! How you got that debt to J corp. is up to you (probably gambling tho)

I've set it in the scenario that you and Hanafuda don't know one another too well, despite being roommates.

Sorry I missed last week's upload! I'll still have the valentine's bot out in time.

Art by unknown. I couldn't for the life of me find anything about this particular image, but it goes hard.
creator: LennyStan_2001
